oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Daily-drive v1.0.0 (session model) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom→auto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-⌘W placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Session Overview (⌘⇧O) UX: full keyboard control (2D arrow card selection, Enter opens, Escape dismisses; selection defaults to the active session + self-heals); card status shown as a border color via a shared ClaudeSessionState.solidStatusColor palette (also consumed by the sidebar dot) replacing the status dot; overlay reworked to a full-bleed .ultraThinMaterial frosted panel — Liquid Glass showed a diagonal sheen at that size (HIG: glass is for chrome/controls, not large content). Delivered via /orchestrate (single-implementer, W=1) + a fresh /code-review medium (clean; only the known multi-workspace ↑/↓ nav limitation). Verified: scripts/build.sh Debug green + warning-free (touch-forced recompile), driven live in the debug app.

Show the latest submitted prompt on each Session Overview card (⌘⇧O), on a line above the branch/diff footer. Capture rides the existing claude-settings hook pipeline: a new UserPromptSubmit hook (tian-hook-prompt.sh) forwards `.prompt` via a new `tian prompt set --text` CLI / `prompt.set` IPC into a per-pane PaneStatusManager store (PVM-mirrored so SwiftUI re-renders, ephemeral, cleared with the status label), surfaced as Session.latestPrompt in SessionOverviewCardView. Delivered via /orchestrate (5 agents, 2 file-disjoint waves) + /code-review (4 findings applied, 1 refuted by design). Verified: 916 tianTests green; hook bundled + wired into UserPromptSubmit in the built app.

Released v1.1.0 — Session Overview grid (mission-control cards): an overlay showing every Claude session across the window's workspaces as a card (name, state dot, branch/diff, status label, live Claude-pane text preview). ⌘⇧O / sidebar-button toggle; click-to-activate; Escape dismiss; untinted Liquid Glass backdrop. Delivered via /orchestrate (5 agents) + /code-review; merged PR #55; built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release + Sparkle appcast live (sign_update clean — EdDSA key in keychain).

Released v1.0.0 — the Workspace→Session model goes public (major bump): built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release live; Sparkle appcast signed + pushed (the v0.18.0 sign_update gotcha is resolved — the EdDSA key is now in the keychain and verified against SUPublicEDKey).

Workspace→Session hierarchy flatten merged (ADR 0004): removed Spaces/Sections/Tabs — a session = one never-split Claude pane + toggleable terminal panel; persistence v6→v7 migration; clean-break IPC/CLI v2 (session verbs, TIAN_SESSION_ID); sessions auto-name from the Claude pane title; Claude exit closes the session; terminal spawn + inspect panel follow Claude's EnterWorktree. Verified: 907 tianTests green, live v6→v7 + CLI smoke, 8-angle adversarial review with all confirmed findings fixed.
